summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MovieLens Content-Based Recommendation System with 7 algorithms, evaluation metrics, and Netflix-style UI. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 7 models active (TF-IDF, Genre, Combined, Word2Vec, BERT, Collaborative, Hybrid)
All recommendation algorithms returning results for movie ID 1
Evaluation metrics endpoint with Precision@K, Recall@K, F1@K, MAP@K, NDCG@K
Similarity endpoint with word2vec_similarity and bert_similarity fields
Homepage with Netflix-style dark dashboard and hero section
All 7 algorithm tabs present and clickable
Evaluation page with bar charts, radar charts, and comparison table
Movie modal with rating stars and 'Get Similar Movies' button
Genre filter with genre pills working
Navigation between Home and Evaluation pages
Model status indicators showing all models active
